name: Tooltip
description: A small, non-interactive label that appears on hover or focus to describe a UI element. Built on Base UI Tooltip with StyleX styling.

Provider.description: Coordinates a shared delay group across multiple sibling tooltips. Once one tooltip in the group has been shown, adjacent tooltips open instantly until the group times out.

delay.description: Milliseconds to wait before opening any tooltip in the group.

closeDelay.description: Milliseconds to wait before closing a tooltip in the group.

timeout.description: If a tooltip closes within this window (ms), the next tooltip in the group opens instantly.

Root.description: Manages open state and provides context to child parts.

onOpenChange.description: Callback fired when open state changes.

disabled.description: Whether the tooltip is disabled (will not open).

Trigger.description: The element the tooltip describes. Opens on hover and focus.

delay.description: Per-trigger override of the open delay (ms). Inherits from Provider when unset.

closeDelay.description: Per-trigger override of the close delay (ms).

dataAttributes.data-popup-open: Present when the tooltip is open.

Portal.description: Renders tooltip content into a React portal.

Positioner.description: Positions the popup relative to the trigger using the same Base UI floating engine as Popover.

sideOffset.description: Offset from the trigger in pixels.

Popup.description: The floating tooltip label. Has role="tooltip" and is wired to the trigger via aria-describedby by Base UI.

dataAttributes.data-open: Present when the tooltip is open.

Arrow.description: An arrow pointing from the popup to the trigger.

cssRequirements.description: Tooltip popup scale/fade animation. Honors prefers-reduced-motion by removing the transform/opacity transition.

intents.reasoning: Tooltip is the standard pattern for describing icon-only buttons or compact controls that lack a visible text label.
Tooltip surfaces a short, non-interactive hint on hover or focus. Use only when the content is purely informational.
Wrap a row of related triggers in Tooltip.Provider so moving between them skips the open delay after the first tooltip is shown.

avoidWhen.scenario: Interactive content (buttons, links, forms inside the popup)
avoidWhen.reasoning: Tooltip is non-interactive and will close on blur. Use Popover for floating panels that contain interactive content.

avoidWhen.scenario: Critical information that users must read
avoidWhen.reasoning: Tooltips are hidden by default and inaccessible on touch without focus. Use inline text, Field description, or Alert for must-see content.
PreviewCard is the right pattern for hover previews of pages, profiles, or media.

avoidWhen.scenario: Disabled triggers that need a tooltip
avoidWhen.reasoning: Disabled buttons don't fire pointer events. Wrap the disabled control in a focusable span (tabIndex={0}, aria-disabled) and put Tooltip.Trigger on that wrapper.
avoidWhen.alternative: Wrap the disabled control in a focusable element

examples.name: shared-delay-group
examples.description: Multiple tooltips sharing a delay group via Provider

examples.name: with-arrow
examples.description: Tooltip with an arrow pointing to the trigger
